texto: There comes a time for each of us when we realize the truth about the enemy. Which is that he is not an idea, or some faceless demon. He is a man. And every man is much like ourselves.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Brian Van Reet: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “There comes a time for each of us when we realize the truth about the enemy. Which is that he is …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, war, there pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
